result: If I could change the world in one way, I would foster in every person an instinctive sense of empathy—where understanding and caring about the feelings and struggles of others is as automatic as breathing. With deeper empathy, so many divides—hatred, violence, neglect, exploitation—would lose their strength. The world would not be perfect, but perhaps it would be a kinder, more connected place.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I would foster in every person an instinctive sense of empathy—where understanding and caring about the feelings and struggles of others is as automatic as breathing. prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
